slides.headline: Metrics for Excellence
slides.body: Unlock your VASCO office’s true potential with these benchmarking strategies.

slides.headline: Collect Data
slides.body: Start by gathering data on key metrics like student enrollment, certification rates, and compliance.

slides.headline: Identify Benchmarks
slides.body: Compare your metrics with those of peer institutions and the national average.
bullets: Refer to the relevant VA guidance for benchmarks

slides.headline: Analyze Gaps
slides.body: Determine areas where your office lags behind and identify root causes.

slides.headline: Set Improvement Plans
slides.body: Develop targeted strategies to close gaps and improve overall performance.

slides.headline: Monitor Progress
slides.body: Regularly review metrics to ensure improvements and make adjustments as needed.
Discover how VASCO Assistant Pro can help you benchmark and improve. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Benchmark your VASCO office with these five steps. Track key metrics, identify gaps, and set improvement plans.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Read the full post' section at the bottom could be more visually distinct to draw more attention to the call to action.
